title: StackRecipe
description:
Combine bands from multiple input images into one multi-band stack with band selection + renaming. Unlike Band Math, no math — bands pass through with optional rename. Use to combine outputs (e.g. stack optical mosaic + radar mosaic + topography) for downstream classification/analysis.

Pipeline: (1) load each input, select only bands in `bandNames.bandNames[*].bands`; (2) rename via `select(originalNames, outputNames)`; (3) concatenate band-wise; (4) clip to union of bounded input geometries.

Output AOI = union of bounded input geometries (no separate AOI field).

**LLM populates everything**: `inputImagery.images` (≥1) and `bandNames.bandNames` (one entry per input with `originalName → outputName` mappings). Defaults empty.

id.description: SEPAL recipe id or EE asset id.

bands.description: All bands the source exposes. Use `image_bands({type, id})` to look up; copy verbatim. `bandNames` entries pick a subset via `originalName` from this list.

bandNames.title: StackBandNames
bandNames.description: Per-image band selection + rename. Each entry maps an `imageId` to bands taken with `originalName` (source) and `outputName` (stack). Unlisted bands are dropped.

originalName.description: Band name in the source image.

outputName.description: Renamed band in stacked output. Max 30 chars; must be unique across entire stack.
